zh.lifeSummary: 當Roger Bernard II Le Grand de Foix於1190年出生在法國阿利艾福瓦時，他的父親Raimond-Roger de Foix38歲，母親Felipa de Montcada19歲。他於1205年1月10日與Ermissenda de Castelbón-Cerdagne結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1241年5月26日在他的家鄉享年51歲，埋葬在法國米迪-列內斯豪-加洛希特加貝勒。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Roger Bernard II Le Grand de Foix于1190年出生在法国阿利艾福瓦时，他的父亲Raimond-Roger de Foix38岁，母亲Felipa de Montcada19岁。他于1205年1月10日与Ermissenda de Castelbón-Cerdagne结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1241年5月26日在他的家乡享年51岁，埋葬在法国米迪-列內斯豪-加洛希特加貝勒。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Foix
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Beate, Dieter, Frieda, Guenter, Heinz, Lothar.
Americanized form of German Voit and of it Polish variant Fojt.

variants.name: Voit
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Eberhard, Erwin, Fritz, Kurt, Otto, Reinhard.

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

nameMeanings.name: Bernard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from ber(n) ‘bear’ + hard ‘hardy, brave, strong’. This was the name of three famous medieval churchmen: St Bernard of Menthon ( 923–1008 ), founder of a hospice on each of the Alpine passes named after him; the monastic reformer St Bernard of Clairvaux ( 1090–1153 ); and the scholastic philosopher Bernard of Chartres. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England. A native Old English form, Beornheard, was superseded by the Norman form.

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: Le
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: Grand
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Transferred use of the surname, common in Scotland, where it is the name of a famous clan. It is derived from a nickname meaning ‘large’ (Anglo-Norman grand). In the United States the name is sometimes bestowed in honour of the Civil War general and 18th president, Ulysses S. Grant ( 1822–85 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Roger Bernard II Le Grand de Foix was born in 1190, in Foix, Ariège, France, his father, Raimond-Roger de Foix, was 38 and his mother, Felipa de Montcada, was 19. He married Ermissenda de Castelbón-Cerdagne on 10 January 1205. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. He died on 26 May 1241, in his hometown, at the age of 51, and was buried in Cintegabelle, Haute-Garonne, Midi-Pyrénées, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Roger Bernard II Le Grand de Foix est né en 1190, à Foix, Ariège, France, son père, Raimond-Roger de Foix, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Felipa de Montcada, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Ermissenda de Castelbón-Cerdagne le 10 janvier 1205. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 26 mai 1241, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 51 ans, et a été enterré à Cintegabelle, Haute-Garonne, Midi-Pyrénées, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Roger Bernard II Le Grand de Foix 1190 in Foix, Ariège, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Raimond-Roger de Foix 38 und seine Mutter Felipa de Montcada 19. Er hat am 10. Januar 1205 Ermissenda de Castelbón-Cerdagne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 26. Mai 1241 im Alter von 51 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Cintegabelle, Haute-Garonne, Midi-Pyrénées, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Roger Bernard II Le Grand de Foix è nato il nel 1190 nel Foix, Ariège, Francia, il suo padre, Raimond-Roger de Foix, aveva 38 anni e il suo madre, Felipa de Montcada, aveva 19 anni. Lui sposato Ermissenda de Castelbón-Cerdagne il 10 gennaio 1205. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. Morì il 26 maggio 1241, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 51 anni, e fu sepolto a Cintegabelle, Haute-Garonne, Midi-Pyrénées, Francia.

ko.lifeSummary: Roger Bernard II Le Grand de Foix(이)가 1190년 프랑스 애리e지 포이스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Raimond-Roger de Foix(은)는 38세였고, 그의 어머니 Felipa de Montcada(은)는 19세였다. 그는 1205년 1월 10일 Ermissenda de Castelbón-Cerdagne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1241년 5월 26일 그의 고향에서 51세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 미디-p이ee스 하테-가니 신테가벨에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Roger Bernard II Le Grand de Foix nasceu em 1190, em Foix, Ariège, França, seu pai, Raimond-Roger de Foix, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Felipa de Montcada, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Ermissenda de Castelbón-Cerdagne em 10 de janeiro de 1205. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 26 de maio de 1241, em sua cidade natal, com 51 anos, e foi sepultado em Cintegabelle, Haute-Garonne, Midi-Pyrénées, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Roger Bernard II Le Grand de Foix родился в 1190 г. в местности фоикс, ариeдж, Франция, его отцу по имени Raimond-Roger de Foix было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Felipa de Montcada, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Ermissenda de Castelbón-Cerdagne 10 января 1205 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Он умер 26 мая 1241 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 51 год и был похоронен в местности синтегабелл, хауте-гаронн, миди-пирeнeесь, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Roger Bernard II Le Grand de Foix nació en 1190, en Foix, Ariège, Francia, su papá, Raimond-Roger de Foix, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Felipa de Montcada, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Ermissenda de Castelbón-Cerdagne el 10 de enero de 1205. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas. Murió el 26 de mayo de 1241, en su pueblo, a la edad de 51 años, y fue sepultado en Cintegabelle, Haute-Garonne, Mediodía-Pirineos, Francia.
